_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: brown r1, blue r2, green r3, red r4, Cinderwyrm (enrage apex boss) r5+. 29.3% at 12000 runs (3521/12000); deeps average ~realm 6.2 (deepest 10), deaths split ~6073 boss / ~2406 room, never 0/100%. The realm-5+ boss is now The Cinderwyrm (red grade T): base offense [str 5, agi 7] is GENTLER than the Emberlord's [7,8] but it ENRAGES below 40% HP (+50% str & agi), so the back half of every deep boss fight spikes to ~[8,11] — harder than the old boss. Net win rate is intentionally near the pre-boss ~29.4% baseline: an A/B at 8000 runs measured the SAME boss with enrage off at 33.5% vs on at 28.4% (~5pt), i.e. the gentler base alone would make it easier and the mechanic claws it back — the mechanic is load-bearing, not a stat bump. Earlier tries: [7,8,100]+enrage(0.4,1.5) cratered to 21.7% (under floor); gentle enrage on Emberlord stats saturated ~26.7% (thin margin); the shipping [5,7,95]+enrage(0.4,1.5) risk/reward trade holds ~29% with wide margin. In-browser (dist) verified: boots clean, realm-5 boss room paints the T tile w/o crash, enraged hits ~1.6x calm over 400 fights.
